g.onclick: sendPrompt('What goes inside the app module of AgentVerse?')
sendPrompt('What reusable components live in ui-common?')

sendPrompt('How are agents structured in the agent module?')

sendPrompt('How does the Gemini connector work?')
sendPrompt('How does the Claude connector work?')
sendPrompt('How are local LLMs integrated in AgentVerse?')
sendPrompt('How is the data module structured in AgentVerse?')
